libssh_begin.tooltip: Initialize the LibSSH ESP32 runtime once before using SSH sessions.

libssh_connect_password.message0: SSH connect session %1 host %2 user %3 password %4 port %5 timeout s %6 log %7
libssh_connect_password.tooltip: Create, configure, connect, and password-authenticate an SSH session.

libssh_session_set_options.message0: set SSH session %1 host %2 user %3 port %4 timeout s %5 log %6
libssh_session_set_options.tooltip: Set host, user, port, timeout, and log verbosity on an SSH session.

libssh_session_connect.tooltip: Connect an SSH session and return true on success.

libssh_session_auth_password.message0: SSH session %1 password auth user %2 password %3 succeeds
libssh_session_auth_password.tooltip: Authenticate an SSH session with username and password.

libssh_session_connected.tooltip: Return true when the SSH session is connected.

libssh_session_error.tooltip: Return the current libssh error text for this session.

libssh_session_disconnect.tooltip: Disconnect a session, optionally free the handle and finalize libssh.

libssh_channel_create.tooltip: Create a channel handle for an SSH session.

libssh_channel_exec.tooltip: Open a session channel and request remote command execution.

libssh_channel_read.message0: read SSH channel %1 max bytes %2 timeout ms %3 stream %4
libssh_channel_read.tooltip: Read text from an SSH channel. Timeout -1 uses blocking read.

libssh_channel_write.tooltip: Write text to an SSH channel.

libssh_channel_close.tooltip: Send EOF, close, free, and clear an SSH channel handle.

libssh_scp_open.tooltip: Create and initialize an SCP handle for a remote location.

libssh_scp_read_text.tooltip: Accept the next SCP file request and read text up to the byte limit.

libssh_scp_write_text.message0: write SCP %1 file %2 text %3 perms %4 succeeds
libssh_scp_write_text.tooltip: Push one text file through an initialized write-mode SCP handle.

libssh_scp_last_size.tooltip: Return the file size captured by the last SCP read request.

libssh_scp_close.tooltip: Close, free, and clear an SCP handle.

libssh_status_code.tooltip: Return a libssh status or SCP request constant.
